requirements.summary: Update the h2 heading in the contact section to professional production-ready copy
acceptanceCriteria: The h2 heading text is updated to professional, customer-facing copy
The text is appropriate for a live production environment

file_operations.description: Update the h2 heading element to reflect production-ready copy suitable for a live website. Replace any placeholder or development text with professional, customer-facing language that clearly communicates the purpose of the contact section.

requirements.summary: Polish container div styling to ensure production-ready appearance
acceptanceCriteria: Container styling is consistent with the overall design system
Visual appearance is polished for production use

file_operations.description: Review and refine the container div styling to ensure it is production-ready and polished. Verify Tailwind classes are optimized, spacing is consistent with the design system, and visual appearance matches production standards.

requirements.summary: Update first form label to production-appropriate text
acceptanceCriteria: Label text is clear and professional

file_operations.description: Update the first form label element to use production-appropriate label text. Ensure the label is clear, professional, and follows accessibility best practices with proper for attributes and descriptive text.

requirements.summary: Update second form label to production-appropriate text
acceptanceCriteria: Label text is clear and professional

file_operations.description: Update the second form label element to use production-appropriate label text. Ensure the label is clear, professional, and follows accessibility best practices with proper for attributes and descriptive text.

requirements.summary: Ensure form element is production-ready with proper validation and submission behavior
acceptanceCriteria: Form submission works correctly in production environment
Form validation provides appropriate user feedback
Form handling is secure and follows best practices

file_operations.description: Review and update the form element to ensure all form attributes, validation, and submission behavior are production-ready. Verify form submission handlers are secure, validation provides clear user feedback, and error states are handled appropriately for production use.

requirements.summary: Update input element to ensure production-appropriate placeholder, attributes, and styling
acceptanceCriteria: Input placeholder text is professional and helpful
Input validation and error states work correctly
Input styling is consistent with production design

file_operations.description: Update the input element to ensure placeholder text, attributes, and styling are appropriate for production. Replace any placeholder or development text with professional, helpful guidance. Verify validation rules and error states work correctly, and styling is consistent with the production design system.
